data.title: CUPE Ontario to speak at 2026 pre-budget consultations with 300,000+ members; press conference at 12:15 pm.
data.description: In Niagara Falls, Fred Hahn, the president of CUPE Ontario, is set to address the Standing Committee on Finance and Economic Affairs on Thursday for the 2026 pre-budget consultations. Preceding this, CUPE Ontario will conduct a press conference at 12:15 p.m. The union boasts over 300,000 members, making it the largest in the province. A notable portion of these workers are engaged in crucial social service sectors such as developmental services, child welfare, child care, and community health centers.

data.title: PowerBank Corp. introduces real-time satellite tracking dashboard for space energy infrastructure. Terrestrial data center constraints addressed.
data.description: PowerBank emphasizes the importance of maintaining uninterrupted visibility and verification in their space-based energy infrastructure to support orbit-to-ground AI workflows. This infrastructure is essential due to increasing limitations on terrestrial data center capacity. This announcement was made in Toronto on January 22, 2026.

data.title: CE mark approved for Gore Viatorr TIPS endoprosthesis with 6-10 mm diameter range, aiding portal hypertension treatment.
data.description: A new TIPS device has been approved as the first of its kind to provide a diameter range of 6-10 mm, giving physicians enhanced control when managing portal hypertension. The device, developed by W. L. Gore & Associates Medical Products (Gore) based in Putzbrunn, Germany, received CE mark approval on January 22, 2026. This innovation is set to offer improved treatment options for patients with portal hypertension, with a focus on precision and accuracy.

data.title: Coors Light unveils Home DeCoors furniture line with 24 pieces, each a case of beer; solution for guests seating, 63% sat on floor at Big Game parties.
data.description: In Toronto, Coors Light has unveiled a unique solution for Big Game party hosts who run short on seating. Introducing Home DeCoors, a collection of 24 furniture pieces, each consisting of a case of beer. With 63% of Canadians confessing to having sat on the floor or makeshift seating during a Big Game party at least once, this innovative furniture line offers a refreshing remedy for space constraints.

data.title: Miata finds high-grade gold with 4.3m at 12.49g/t and 22.7m at 2.23g/t at Sela Creek in Suriname. Exciting results!
data.description: Miata has discovered significant gold mineralization at the Jons Trend within the Sela Creek Gold Project in Suriname. They found a high-grade intersection of 4.3 meters containing 12.49 grams/ton of gold, as well as a broader intersection of 22.7 meters with 2.23 grams/ton of gold. These findings indicate a promising potential for gold extraction in the area.

data.title: Consensus Cloud Solutions will host earnings call on Feb 10, 2026 at 8:30 AM ET for Q4 and 2025 Year End results. CEO, CFO, and CRO to discuss.
data.description: Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCSI) is set to hold a live audio webcast for its Q4 and 2025 Year End earnings call at 8:30 AM ET on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. The call will feature the company's Chief Executive Officer, Scott Turicchi, Chief Revenue Officer, Johnny Hecker, and Chief Financial Officer, Jim Malone. Interested parties including the public, press, and financial community are encouraged to tune in to the webcast. This event offers a significant opportunity to gain insights into the financial performance of Consensus Cloud Solutions for Q4 of 2025 and the full year.

data.title: Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK) to report Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb. 5 before market opens, conference call at 7:30 a.m. CST. Website: www.rockwellautomation.com.
data.description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) will announce its first quarter fiscal 2026 results on Feb. 5 before the market opens. The report will be available on the Rockwell Investor Relations website. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 7:30 a.m. CST on the same day. The call can be accessed via audio webcast on the Rockwell Automation Investor Relations website.

data.title: FlexTecs receives investment from Cohere Capital to boost services expansion and tech innovation for growth.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, FlexTecs, a renowned company specializing in recovery audit, contract compliance, and payment accuracy technology, revealed a significant financial backing from Cohere Capital, a private equity firm based in Boston. This strategic investment showcases Cohere Capital's focus on investing in unique technology ventures.

data.title: Iridium to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 12, 2026, conference call at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: In McLean, Virginia on January 22, 2026, Iridium Communications Inc. (Nasdaq: IRDM), a prominent global provider of satellite services for voice, data, and PNT, announced its upcoming conference call scheduled for February 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The call aims to delve into the Company's recent performance and outlook.

data.title: Goodfin introduces Goodfin Go with AI agents for million-dollar private market investments, saving time with curated insights.
data.description: A cutting-edge AI wealth platform has revolutionized the financial landscape by condensing weeks of work into mere minutes. Through its services, including customized insights, monitoring of portfolios, and actionable advice, Goodfin is reshaping the way private market investing is accessed by individuals. Based in San Francisco, this platform is propelling a new era in wealth management by offering a seamless experience. Founded on January 22, 2026, Goodfin has quickly made a significant impact by providing unparalleled efficiency and innovation in the financial sphere.

data.title: Nexar appoints Yann LeCun to Board, a leader in AI solutions with large vision network on US roads.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Nexar, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven mobility solutions and boasting one of the largest distributed vision networks across U.S. roads, revealed the addition of AI expert Yann LeCun to its Board of Directors. This move comes as physical AI systems, focusing on perception, are gaining significant traction in various industries.

data.title: WhiteFiber priced $210.0 million convertible senior notes offering, providing AI and HPC solutions.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, WhiteFiber, Inc. (Nasdaq: WYFI), a leading company in artificial intelligence infrastructure and high-performance computing solutions, revealed the pricing details of a $210.0 million principal amount bond with an interest rate of 4.500%.

data.title: CSX likely to report lower Q4 earnings at 41 cents per share, down from 42 cents in the year-ago period, with expected revenue of $3.54 billion.
data.description: CSX Corporation, listed under NASDAQ as CSX, is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after market close on Thursday, January 22. Analysts are predicting a slight decline in earnings to 41 cents per share, compared to 42 cents in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to remain steady at $3.54 billion, in line with the previous year. CSX recently exceeded expectations in its third-quarter financial report on October 16. Following this news, CSX's shares saw a 2.9% increase, closing at $36.53 on Wednesday. For more detailed information, including analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Mayfair Gold will trade on NYSE American as "MINE" starting Jan 27, 2026 with common shares listed.
data.description: Mayfair Gold Corp. ("Mayfair" or the "Company") has obtained authorization to list its common shares (the "Common Shares") on the NYSE American LLC ("NYSE American"). The Company's ticker symbols will be TSX-V: MFG and OTCQX: MFGCD. This move, announced on Jan. 22, 2026, marks a significant milestone for Mayfair Gold as it expands its presence in the market.

data.title: Mobileye (Nasdaq: MBLY) released strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results exceeding expectations. Profits enable continued investment in products.
data.description: In Jerusalem, Mobileye Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MBLY) has reported its financial performance for the quarter and year ending on December 27, 2025. The company exceeded its projections for 2025, with President and CEO Prof. Amnon Shashu commending the team for the achievement. Mobileye is now well-positioned for 2026, boasting a robust business model that generates cash, allowing for sustained investment in innovative products within its range.
